caption:
Word-of-mouth is great. A website makes it last.

New residents hit Google before they ask a neighbor.
If you're not showing up, someone else is taking that job.

topic: Myth: 'My customers are all word-of-mouth, I don't need a website'

beats: Your best customer retires, moves, or stops referring. Then what?
New people move to the High Desert every single day searching online.
No website means they find your competitor before they ever find you.
